productDisplayName: SDL by Sweet Dreams Women Black Night suits
description: Style Note Perfect to slip into on a lazy day, to wear at a girly pyjama party or just for after-hours at home, these pyjama sets from SDL Loungewear instantly transport you to a world of calm. Crafted from soft cotton in pretty and feminine styles, they offer exemplary comfort and a flattering Fit.Product DetailsBlack and white checked and printed design, colour which has a round neck with a front buttoned placket, short sleeves,  available pyjama in black and two pockets on left and right and an elasticated waist with draw cordMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach, dry clean or iron on decoration or printTumble dry, normal, low heatIron low and dry in shadeSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size M
